description: A shell/command task reports changed on every run, breaking idempotency and masking real drift.
body: Failure mode: a task uses shell or command without guards, so it runs unconditionally and reports changed on every play, breaking idempotency and hiding whether real drift occurred. Detection signals: the same task always yellow/changed across consecutive runs; handlers firing every time; no stable converged state. Do not use raw commands where a module exists. Safer fallback: replace the command with a state-declaring module, or guard it with creates/changed_when, and confirm a second run reports zero changed.
